_comment: Example convergent plugin catalog manifest (Phase 10). Host it on an SSRF-allowlisted https URL and set it as the catalog URL in gitplugins Configuration. Either a bare list or {"plugins":[...]} is accepted. Each entry needs a valid plugin_key (a-z0-9_) and an https url; ref_policy ∈ track_branch|latest_tag|pin_tag|pin_sha|release (default latest_tag). Optional per-entry known_issues feed the Phase 7 registry under source 'catalog'. Advisory only — every install still runs the full confirm + preflight.

plugins.name: Comm Center
plugins.description: Operator console for the Comm suite.

plugins.name: Asset Report
plugins.description: High-fidelity PDF asset reports (optional mPDF backend).

plugins.name: Asset CVE
plugins.description: Correlate installed software against CVE feeds.

known_issues.message: First sync pulls the full CVE feed; schedule off-peak.
